chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-03 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. For orders on M.A. No.4076/2022. 30.03.2022 Mr. Aijaz Ahmed, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. = Urgency is granted. The petitioner, by way of instant petition has sought for permission to deposit the outstanding amount towards the lease of the subject land, in advance. The contractual obligation involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
